textPlain: Interesting. I reviewd the live-bootstrap project (a project to build a trusted C compiler for building Linux) in the past years, including writing a Linux on i368 simulator/interpreter, and gave a presentation about this at WHY2025.
Assigning 11 to mean "v" in the sequence "\v" sounds like replacing words (or letters) with numbers.Is that related to Godel's idea that a system can be either complete or inconsistent?
"\v" is an ASCII control character, and means "vertical tab" (VT). In ASCII it is code 11, which is why they are inserting the number 11.
